## Type of Change
- [ ] Bug fix (fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (may cause issues with existing functionality)
- [ ] Documentation update

## Testing
- [ ] Changes have been tested locally
- [ ] No new console warnings or errors
- [ ] Tested in both browser and extension (if applicable)

## Checklist
- [ ] Code follows project style guidelines
- [ ] README has been updated (if needed)
- [ ] No new dependencies added (or discussed with maintainers)
- [ ] TypeScript/Vite build succeeds (`npm run build`)
